description: Contract-backed smoke proof for offline_tuner scheduler recommendations derived from deterministic scheduler evidence artifacts.

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify mixed-burst 64-core scheduler evidence recommends the scale_workers profile with stable reason codes.
smoke_scenarios.command_prefix: cargo run -p asupersync --bin offline_tuner --features cli,simd-intrinsics -- scheduler-recommend

notes: Execute mode is safe because the evidence artifact is committed and deterministic.
This scenario is the lab-safe anchor for later real-host scheduler evidence bundles.

template_env.SCHEDULER_RECOMMEND_SMOKE_OUTPUT_DIR: Override the output root when bundling artifacts elsewhere.

capture_plan: Use the committed evidence artifact embedded in this contract.
Execute the runner directly or replay the emitted scheduler_evidence.json through offline_tuner.

smoke_scenarios.description: Capture a live runtime-emitted scheduler evidence artifact from the deterministic integration test, then replay it through offline_tuner.
smoke_scenarios.command_prefix: cargo run -p asupersync --bin offline_tuner --features cli,simd-intrinsics -- scheduler-recommend

notes: This scenario proves the reusable runner can consume a runtime-emitted scheduler evidence artifact instead of only the contract fixture.
The emitted metrics are deterministic enough for schema and pipeline validation, but not pinned to a fixed tuning projection.

template_env.ASUPERSYNC_SCHEDULER_EVIDENCE_CAPTURE_PA: Runner-managed path for the integration test to write scheduler_evidence.json.

capture_plan: Execute the deterministic integration test with ASUPERSYNC_SCHEDULER_EVIDENCE_CAPTURE_PATH pointing at the bundle-local scheduler_evidence.json.
Replay the captured evidence through offline_tuner to prove the runner path works with live runtime artifacts.
Treat report completion and bundle integrity as the deterministic contract; the exact recommendation projection is intentionally not pinned here.

smoke_scenarios.description: Emit a dry-run-only real-host template bundle for collecting scheduler evidence on a 64-core / 256GiB swarm node before invoking offline_tuner.
smoke_scenarios.command_prefix: cargo run -p asupersync --bin offline_tuner --features cli,simd-intrinsics -- scheduler-recommend

notes: Replace the placeholder metrics in the emitted scheduler_evidence.json with live host telemetry before invoking offline_tuner.
Use this template for operator-grade evidence capture on large swarm hosts, not as a deterministic correctness oracle.

template_env.ASUPERSYNC_SCHEDULER_COMMAND_TEMPLATE: cargo run -p asupersync --bin offline_tuner --features cli,simd-intrinsics -- scheduler-recommend --evidence-file <captured-evidence.json> --output-file <output.json>

capture_plan: Populate wake-to-run, queue residency, ready backlog, cancel debt, and remote steal metrics from a real 64-core / 256GiB host.
Replace the placeholder notes and metrics in scheduler_evidence.json before direct offline_tuner execution.
Keep this runner invocation in dry-run mode; use the emitted bundle as a reproducible operator template.
